title: Protest staged against PM Ranil
body_lines: High-Level Road is blocked near Thurstan College in Colombo due to a protest staged by the Samagi Jana Balawegaya (SJB) members against Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe, says Ada Derana correspondent.
Led by former MP Hirunika Premachandra, several representatives of women’s organizations have also joined the protest.

The demonstration kicked off near the private residence of the prime minister and later moved towards the Thurstan College. Reportedly, special measures have been taken to beef up the security in the area.
In the meantime, a group of anti-government protesters from the ‘GotaGoGama’ has staged a protest blocking the Bank of Ceylon Road in Colombo Fort.
